jd_text: We are not hiring a manager. We are hiring someone who can build, launch, and scale a revenue-generating home service operation from zero. We operate 6 active beauty salons in Dubai and are now launching a dedicated home service division. We need a builder who can turn this into a scalable, profitable business. 🔥 What You Will Own: Launch the full home service division from scratch Build and manage therapist teams (nail, hair, massage) Design and execute booking, dispatch, pricing, and commission systems Control daily operations and service quality Work closely with marketing, CRM, and sales teams Drive revenue, retention, and repeat bookings 🎯 Targets: Launch within 30 days Achieve stable bookings within 60 days Reach profitability within 90 days ✅ Non-Negotiables: Proven track record of launching or scaling a home service or salon business in Dubai Strong understanding of Dubai zones, customer behavior, and pricing sensitivity Experience recruiting and managing service teams Ability to build systems, not just operate them Proven ability to drive revenue and operational performance 🚫 This Role Is NOT For: Corporate managers who only report and don’t execute Candidates without real Dubai market experience Operations staff who have never built something from zero Social media or branding-only profiles 💰 Compensation: Fixed monthly salary Performance-based bonus (linked to revenue, service volume, retention, and ratings) Equity opportunity based on performance ⚡ Final Filter: If you have built or scaled a home service operation and can deliver real results within 90 days — apply.
